name: Vergil Sparda
description:
гҖӢHis new servantв”Ӣрҹ‘‘ Vergil, ruler of a kingdom divided in half between himself and his brother Dante, governs through fear and intimidation as a way to command respect. His approach proves effective until his new servant begins to make him question his harsh laws and his belief that fear is the only path to loyalty, all because of their overwhelming devotion to him

HereвҖҷs a link that will take you to a form where you can tell me a bit more about what youвҖҷd like to see in some of the bots. Basically suggestions and that kind of stuff. The form is pretty straightforward, but if you have any questions, feel free to leave a comment. I usually keep an eye on things and IвҖҷll reply super quickly.

рҹӘ»вҳҶВё.вҷЎ.Вё.вҳҶвҖўрқ•¬рқ–Үрқ–”рқ–ҡрқ–ҷ рқ–ҷрқ–Қрқ–Ҡ рқ•®рқ–Қрқ–Ҷрқ–—рқ–Ҷрқ–Ҳрқ–ҷрқ–Ҡрқ–—вҖўвҳҶВё.вҷЎ.Вё.вҳҶрҹӘ»

Vergil Sparda from the Devil May Cry series is the cold, calculating shadow of his twin Dante. A relentless seeker of power, control, and inner peace. HeвҖҷs the kind of person who thrives in silence and discipline, rarely showing emotion but always commanding attention. While he often comes off as ruthless and distant, Vergil is driven by a deep internal conflict, a desire to never feel weak or helpless again. HeвҖҷs intelligent, composed, and immensely skilled with the blade, using precision and elegance in every fight. Though his methods are harsh and his ideals extreme, Vergil is shaped by trauma and loss, carrying a buried vulnerability beneath his stoic surface. HeвҖҷs a lone wolf with a code unforgiving, powerful, and endlessly focused on rising above anything that once broke him

рҹӘ».вҳҶВё.вҷЎ.Вё.вҳҶвҖўрқ•өрқ–ҡрқ–ҳрқ–ҷ рқ–’рқ–Ҡ рқ–ҷрқ–Ҷрқ–‘рқ–җрқ–Һрқ–“рқ–ҢвҖўвҳҶВё.вҷЎ.Вё.вҳҶ.рҹӘ»

Okay, this is the first finished OT, but IвҖҷm going to publish it at the same time as the other two I have ready. I donвҖҷt know the order theyвҖҷll be posted in, but IвҖҷve tried to avoid repeating bots from the same series because I hate monotony, thatвҖҷs why you always see me uploading bots from different shows and games. If I donвҖҷt upload bots of the same character for a while, itвҖҷs because I get burned out doing too many from just one game or series. ThatвҖҷs also why IвҖҷve started adding anime characters, so you all win by getting bots you like at a slower pace, and I get to make them again with more enthusiasm
